summary: List auto reply templates available for offer template
description: List auto reply templates available for offer template. Endpoint: GET /c/{company_id}/offer_templates/{offer_template_id}/auto_reply_templates. Required parameters: offer_template_id, company_id. Optional parameters include title.
example_request:
GET /c/{company_id}/offer_templates/{offer_template_id}/auto_reply_templates

Required params: offer_template_id, company_id

Optional params: title
